forecast-period.text: Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from late this morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending westerly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 11 and 15.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloud clearing. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening then becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending easterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:50am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog north of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog north of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning frost in the far west. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds becoming easterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.
